sourceName: San Francisco Ethics Commission Campaign Contributions (Schedule A)
notes: SF Ethics Commission campaign-finance transactions (Socrata, keyless), filtered to Form 460 Schedule A (monetary contributions received) where a first name is present (individual donors) and dated 2025+. San Francisco public record; reuse permitted. Local ingestion approved; PUBLIC DISPLAY of donor data is gated pending the same campaign-finance display-policy review as FEC Schedule A. No street-level address in this schedule (city/state/zip only).
where: form_type='A' AND transaction_first_name IS NOT NULL AND transaction_date>'2025-01-01'
